summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Tested: Crontab CRUD operations, manual task execution, scheduler status, task toggle, and SSO status endpoint.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use dynamic creation and cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features working correctly. APScheduler is integrated and running in background. Crontab CRUD endpoints require admin role. Scheduler syncs automatically when crontabs are created/updated/deleted. SSO endpoints exist but return disabled status since no client keys are configured (expected behavior).

crontab_crud.POST /api/crontabs: PASS - Creates crontab with id, name, type, schedule, enabled, last_run, last_result, last_status
crontab_crud.GET /api/crontabs: PASS - Returns list of all crontabs
crontab_crud.PUT /api/crontabs/{id}: PASS - Updates crontab fields (name, schedule, enabled)
crontab_crud.DELETE /api/crontabs/{id}: PASS - Deletes crontab and removes from scheduler

crontab_task_types.sftp_scan: PASS - Executes SFTP scan and returns result with files_scanned count
crontab_task_types.price_history: PASS - Records price history for all recipes, returns 'X recettes enregistrees'

crontab_manual_run.last_run_updated: PASS - last_run timestamp updated after execution

scheduler_status.GET /api/scheduler/status: PASS - Returns running=true and jobs list
scheduler_status.next_run_times: PASS - Active jobs show next_run ISO timestamp
scheduler_status.disabled_jobs_removed: PASS - Disabled crontabs removed from scheduler

crontab_toggle.enable_disable: PASS - PUT with enabled=false disables task
crontab_toggle.scheduler_sync: PASS - Disabled tasks removed from scheduler jobs

sso_status.GET /api/auth/sso/status: PASS - Public endpoint returns google_enabled and microsoft_enabled
sso_status.no_keys_configured: PASS - Both return false when no client keys configured

frontend_crontabs_tab.scheduler_status_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Scheduler actif — les tâches s'exécutent automatiquement' with green dot
frontend_crontabs_tab.task_type_selector: PASS - Shows 'Scan SFTP' and 'Enregistrement historique prix' options
frontend_crontabs_tab.schedule_selector: PASS - Shows frequency options (5min, 15min, 30min, hourly, etc.)
frontend_crontabs_tab.task_list: PASS - Shows created tasks with name, schedule, type
frontend_crontabs_tab.run_button: PASS - Play icon button triggers manual execution
frontend_crontabs_tab.delete_button: PASS - Trash icon button deletes task

frontend_sso_tab.google_sso_section: PASS - Shows Google SSO with toggle and config fields
frontend_sso_tab.microsoft_sso_section: PASS - Shows Microsoft SSO with toggle and config fields
